evals.prompt: I'm about to ship my portfolio site at https://playwright.dev and I need full QA coverage before I go live. Can you crawl the site, generate a complete Playwright test suite for all the major pages, run the tests, and set up a GitHub Actions workflow so it runs on every PR?
evals.expected_output: A complete playwright-tests/ project directory with Page Objects, spec files for multiple pages, a journey test, playwright.config.ts, GitHub Actions workflow, TEST_PLAN.md, and TEST_RESULTS.md after running.

assertions.name: generates-multiple-spec-files
assertions.description: At least 2 .spec.ts files are generated (one per discovered page)

assertions.name: generates-page-objects
assertions.description: At least 2 .page.ts Page Object files are generated

assertions.name: generates-playwright-config
assertions.description: playwright.config.ts is present in the output

assertions.name: generates-test-plan-doc
assertions.description: TEST_PLAN.md is present and contains a coverage table

assertions.name: generates-test-results-doc
assertions.description: TEST_RESULTS.md is present with pass/fail summary after running

assertions.name: uses-page-object-pattern
assertions.description: Spec files import from the pages/ directory (not raw selectors inline)

evals.prompt: hey can you write playwright tests for my whole site? the url is https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com — it's an API site so make sure you cover the REST endpoints too, not just browser stuff. want it runnable locally.
evals.expected_output: A Playwright project with API-level tests using Playwright's request context, browser tests for the page UI, Page Objects, config, and setup instructions for local use.

assertions.name: generates-api-tests
assertions.description: API test suite is present that uses apiRequest (no browser) to test REST endpoints

assertions.name: api-tests-check-status-codes
assertions.description: API tests assert HTTP status codes (200, 404, etc.)

assertions.name: includes-run-instructions
assertions.description: Output includes npm install and npx playwright test command for local use

evals.prompt: I need a full QA automation setup for https://the-internet.herokuapp.com — this is a test practice site with tons of different UI patterns (forms, drag and drop, alerts, auth, etc.). Generate tests for as many pages as you can, run them, and tell me what passed and what didn't.
evals.expected_output: Multi-page test suite covering diverse UI patterns, test execution results showing pass/fail per test, TEST_RESULTS.md with failure diagnosis and recommendations.

assertions.name: test-results-present
assertions.description: TEST_RESULTS.md has a summary table with passed/failed counts

assertions.name: failure-diagnosis-present
assertions.description: TEST_RESULTS.md includes a Failures section with diagnosis for any failures
